creator: smkelly@zombie.org
text:
Attempts to compile the ImageMagick port fail.  The port is used
        by other things such as apsfilter, therefore making it difficult
        to compile and install them also.

Fix: 

I do not know, as I don't know what sys/byteorder.h is.
How-To-Repeat: 
	$ cd /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick
	$ make
	...
	In file included from /usr/X11R6/include/X11/Xos.h:307,
                 from xwindows.h:15,
                 from PreRvIcccm.c:55:
/usr/X11R6/include/X11/Xarch.h:48: sys/byteorder.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
